About Us

Empowering Smart Manufacturing, Seeing the Future

Qingdao Utocom Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004, specializing in industrial cameras, machine vision systems, and intelligent vision solutions. We are committed to providing high-performance, high-reliability vision products and technical services for global manufacturing.

20+
Years Experience
3000+
Product Models
50,000+
Enterprise Clients
200+
Tech Patents
30+
Countries/Regions
98.6%
Customer Satisfaction

Our Mission

Empower smart manufacturing with leading vision technology, helping global enterprises improve product quality, increase production efficiency, reduce manufacturing costs, and promote the development of Industry 4.0 and smart manufacturing.

Our Vision

Become a world-leading industrial vision solution provider, giving every manufacturing machine intelligent "eyes" and making smart manufacturing within reach.

Core Values

Our Commitment

Focus

20 years focused on industrial vision, continuous innovation

Efficiency

Quick response to customer needs, efficient delivery

Reliability

Industrial-grade quality, stable and reliable

Service

Customer-centric, dedicated service

Our Journey

20 Years of Innovation

2004

Company Founded

Utocom established in Qingdao, focusing on industrial camera R&D

2008

First Product

Launched first domestic GigE industrial camera

2012

Tech Breakthrough

Independently developed 20MP high-resolution camera

2016

Smart Camera

Released first embedded smart camera

2020

3D Vision

Launched structured light and ToF 3D camera series

2024

Industry Leader

Serving 50,000+ enterprise customers worldwide
